name: MacroWell OMG Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd.
summary: MacroWell OMG Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd. provides online games and community space. The company was formerly known as Macrowell Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to MacroWell OMG Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd. in August 2009. MacroWell OMG Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
